name: Chemical Elements
description: The 118 named chemical elements of the periodic table.

question_templates.prompt: {category} whose name begins with a consonant
{category} containing at least one of the letters P, O, I, N, T, L, E or S
{category} with names of six letters or fewer
Elements of the periodic table whose name begins with a consonant
Chemical elements whose first vowel is I
Chemical elements with atomic numbers from 57 to 71
Chemical elements with a one-letter symbol
